title: Smoky Coconut Tacos
description: A Mexican-inspired dish that combines the flavors of smoky cheese, crumbly tortillas, and coconut. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the crumle spice blend and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the caramelized onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the shredded smoky cheese and stir until melted.
Add the coconut milk and stir until combined.
Warm the crumbly tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the cheese mixture onto a tortilla and topping with fresh cilantro.
Optional: Add diced chicken or beef to make the tacos more substantial.
